ucs.title: [LLM] Suckfly (G0039) chain — stolen-cert signed binary in user-writable path → net discovery + LSASS credential dumping
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Suckfly tradecraft documented by Symantec (2016): a binary signed with a stolen code-signing certificate (or carrying legitimate-looking version-info CompanyName) executes from a non-standard, user-writable path and within ~60 minutes drives cmd.exe-based internal network discovery (Hackode-style nbtscan/net view/arp) plus LSASS credential access. Suckfly's value to PRC operators was certificate theft from South Korean ISVs/MMO publishers, so the cert-abuse + Windows-cmd-recon + creddump triad is a much tighter fit than any single technique alone.
ucs.splunk:
| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as signed_process_cmd values(Processes.process_hash) as signed_sha values(Processes.process_path) as signed_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_path IN ("*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*","*\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\*","*\\PerfLogs\\*","*\\Windows\\Temp\\*") AND Processes.process_signature_verified=true AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process_signature | rename Processes.* as * | rename firstTime as suspect_first lastTime as suspect_last
| join type=inner dest [
    | tstats summariesonly=true count as discovery_count values(Processes.process) as discovery_cmds min(_time) as discovery_first max(_time) as discovery_last from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name="cmd.exe" OR Processes.process_name IN ("net.exe","nbtstat.exe","nbtscan.exe","arp.exe","ipconfig.exe","netsh.exe","ping.exe") AND (Processes.process="*nbtscan*" OR Processes.process="*net view*" OR Processes.process="*net group*" OR Processes.process="*net localgroup*" OR Processes.process="*arp -a*" OR Processes.process="*netsh interface*" OR Processes.process="*ipconfig /all*" OR Processes.process="*ping -n*") by Processes.dest | rename Processes.dest as dest
]
| join type=inner dest [
    | tstats summariesonly=true count as cred_count values(Processes.process) as cred_cmds min(_time) as cred_first max(_time) as cred_last from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process="*sekurlsa*" OR Processes.process="*logonpasswords*" OR Processes.process="*lsadump*" OR Processes.process="*comsvcs.dll*MiniDump*" OR Processes.process="*procdump*lsass*" OR Processes.process="*ntds.dit*" OR Processes.process_name="mimikatz.exe") by Processes.dest | rename Processes.dest as dest
]
| eval suspect_to_discovery_min = round((discovery_first-suspect_first)/60,1)
| eval suspect_to_cred_min = round((cred_first-suspect_first)/60,1)
| where suspect_to_discovery_min >= 0 AND suspect_to_discovery_min <= 60 AND suspect_to_cred_min >= 0 AND suspect_to_cred_min <= 60
| table suspect_first dest user process_name signed_path signed_sha process_signature discovery_cmds cred_cmds suspect_to_discovery_min suspect_to_cred_min
| sort - suspect_first
ucs.kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMin = 60m;
// Suckfly drops signed implants (Nidiran et al.) into user-writable paths
let _suspect_paths = dynamic([@"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Windows\Temp\"]);
// Hackode / classic Windows recon repertoire
let _disco_tokens = dynamic(["nbtscan","net view","net group","net localgroup","arp -a","netsh interface","ipconfig /all","ping -n"]);
// LSASS / SAM dump indicators
let _cred_tokens = dynamic(["sekurlsa","logonpasswords","lsadump","comsvcs.dll, MiniDump","procdump","ntds.dit","mimikatz"]);
let _suspect_bins = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where isnotempty(ProcessVersionInfoCompanyName)        // version-info populated => signed/legit-looking
    | where FolderPath has_any (_suspect_paths)              // but living somewhere users shouldn't sign things
    | where FolderPath !startswith @"C:\Windows\" and FolderPath !startswith @"C:\Program Files"
    | project SignedTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              SignedBin = FileName, SignedSHA = SHA256,
              CompanyName = ProcessVersionInfoCompanyName,
              SignedCmd = ProcessCommandLine, SignedPath = FolderPath;
let _disco = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "cmd.exe" or FileName =~ "cmd.exe")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_disco_tokens)
    | project DiscoveryTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DiscoveryCmd = ProcessCommandLine;
let _creds = union
    ( DeviceProcessEvents
      | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
      | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_cred_tokens)
      | project CredTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, CredCmd = ProcessCommandLine ),
    ( DeviceEvents
      | where Timestamp > ago(LookbackDays)
      | where ActionType =~ "OpenProcessApiCall"
      | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("MsMpEng.exe","csrss.exe","wininit.exe","services.exe","lsm.exe","WmiPrvSE.exe")
      | where tostring(parse_json(AdditionalFields).TargetImageFileName) has "lsass.exe"
      | project CredTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, CredCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine );
_suspect_bins
| join kind=inner _disco on DeviceId
| where DiscoveryTime between (SignedTime .. SignedTime + WindowMin)
| join kind=inner _creds on DeviceId
| where CredTime between (SignedTime .. SignedTime + WindowMin)
| summarize FirstSignedSeen = min(SignedTime),
            DiscoverySamples = make_set(DiscoveryCmd, 10),
            CredSamples = make_set(CredCmd, 10),
            DeltaDiscoveryMin = min(datetime_diff('minute', DiscoveryTime, SignedTime)),
            DeltaCredMin = min(datetime_diff('minute', CredTime, SignedTime))
            by DeviceName, AccountName, SignedBin, SignedSHA, CompanyName, SignedPath
| order by FirstSignedSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let LookbackDays = 14d;
let WindowMin = 60m;
let _suspect_paths = dynamic([@"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\AppData\Local\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\", @"\Windows\Temp\"]);
let _disco_tokens = dynamic(["nbtscan","net view","net group","net localgroup","arp -a","netsh interface","ipconfig /all","ping -n"]);
let _cred_tokens = dynamic(["sekurlsa","logonpasswords","lsadump","comsvcs.dll, MiniDump","procdump","ntds.dit","mimikatz"]);
// 1. Signed binary (CompanyName populated) executing from a user-writable path
let _suspect_bins = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
    | where isnotempty(ActingProcessFileCompany)
    | where ActingProcessName has_any (_suspect_paths)
    | where ActingProcessName !startswith @"C:\Windows\" and ActingProcessName !startswith @"C:\Program Files"
    | project SignedTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, ActorUsername,
              SignedBin = ActingProcessName, SignedSHA = SHA256,
              CompanyName = ActingProcessFileCompany,
              SignedCmd = ActingProcessCommandLine;
// 2. Discovery via cmd / net / nbt / arp
let _disco = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where ParentProcessName has "cmd.exe" or TargetProcessName has_any ("net.exe","nbtstat.exe","arp.exe","ipconfig.exe","netsh.exe","ping.exe")
    | where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (_disco_tokens)
    | project DiscoveryTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, DiscoveryCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine;
// 3. Credential dumping signal
let _creds = ImProcessCreate
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(LookbackDays)
    | where TargetProcessCommandLine has_any (_cred_tokens) or ParentProcessCommandLine has_any (_cred_tokens)
    | project CredTime = TimeGenerated, DvcHostname, CredCmd = TargetProcessCommandLine;
_suspect_bins
| join kind=inner _disco on DvcHostname
| where DiscoveryTime between (SignedTime .. SignedTime + WindowMin)
| join kind=inner _creds on DvcHostname
| where CredTime between (SignedTime .. SignedTime + WindowMin)
| summarize FirstSignedSeen = min(SignedTime),
            DiscoverySamples = make_set(DiscoveryCmd, 10),
            CredSamples = make_set(CredCmd, 10),
            DeltaDiscoveryMin = min(datetime_diff('minute', DiscoveryTime, SignedTime)),
            DeltaCredMin = min(datetime_diff('minute', CredTime, SignedTime))
            by DvcHostname, ActorUsername, SignedBin, SignedSHA, CompanyName
| order by FirstSignedSeen desc
ucs.rationale: Suckfly's tradecraft is uniquely characterised by stolen code-signing certificates from South Korean software vendors (Symantec, March 2016) used to sign the Nidiran backdoor and helper tooling, paired with the Hackode toolkit for internal network/host discovery and Mimikatz/ProcDump-style credential dumping. A generic 'signed binary' or 'lsass dump' rule will alert constantly; a generic 'net view
